name: code-archaeology-analyst
description: Deep codebase archaeology analysis. Triggered by a GitHub issue or Azure DevOps work item tagged with 'code-archaeology'. Reads the codebase module by module, maps capabilities, extracts patterns, classifies work into Enhancement/Remediation/Migration Bolts, writes AI-DLC repository overlay files, checks test coverage, and posts the full analysis back as ordered comments on the originating issue or work item.
